items.headline: SpaceX launches 27 Starlink satellites on Falcon 9 from Vandenberg (fixture)

explainer.tagline: Fixture item for layout testing. Not a real news item; removed at launch prep.
explainer.what_happened: SpaceX launched a Falcon 9 carrying 27 Starlink satellites from Vandenberg Space Force Base. The booster landed on a droneship, per the launch webcast.
explainer.why_it_matters: Starlink deployment cadence sets the pace for every competing connectivity constellation and keeps downward pressure on rideshare pricing.

items.headline: ICEYE signs SAR data contract with ESA for flood monitoring (fixture)

explainer.tagline: Fixture item for layout testing. Not a real news item; removed at launch prep.
explainer.what_happened: ICEYE announced a contract with the European Space Agency to supply SAR imagery for flood monitoring across member states. The company did not disclose the contract value.
explainer.why_it_matters: Institutional SAR procurement in Europe is a recurring revenue base that ICEYE competitors bid for; each award shifts reference pricing for the next tender.

items.headline: AST SpaceMobile receives FCC approval for constellation modification (fixture)

explainer.tagline: Fixture item for layout testing. Not a real news item; removed at launch prep.
explainer.what_happened: The FCC granted AST SpaceMobile a modification of its space station authorization, per the filing. The grant covers changes to the planned constellation configuration.
explainer.why_it_matters: Direct-to-device spectrum and licensing decisions in the US market define the commercial ceiling for every D2D operator, and FCC grants are the binding constraint.
